name: Multiple Threats Detected on Same Host (by Source Address)
notes: This rule triggers when multiple threats have been detected on the same host.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Protection Devices, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS
when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source Address and different Threat Name (custom) in 30 minutes
when an event matches any of the following Multiple Threats Detected on Same Host (by Machine Identifier)
thresholds: when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source Address and different Threat Name (custom) in 30 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Multiple Threats Detected on Same Host (by Source Address) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Endpoint Protection Devices, BB:DeviceDefinition: IDS / IPS
AND when at least 5 events are seen with the same Source Address and different Threat Name (custom) in 30 minutes
AND NOT when an event matches any of the following Multiple Threats Detected on Same Host (by Machine Identifier)
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Threats Detected on Same Host (Source IP)
Event description: Multiple threats have been detected on the same host.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
